settings.text: A monthly box of gear, tools, and toys for the guy who'd rather be at the track. Curated by gearheads, not algorithms. Pre-orders open now — first boxes ship early August 2026.

settings.title: 1. Pick your tier
settings.text: Choose Pit Stop, Apex, or Podium. Cancel anytime — no long-term commitment, no fine print.

settings.title: 2. We curate
settings.text: Every month, our team of motorheads picks 4–8 items worth more than what you paid. Tools, apparel, gadgets, garage essentials.

settings.title: 3. Box at your door
settings.text: Free shipping in the US. Boxes ship the 15th of every month. Get back to your garage.

settings.title: PIT STOP — $54/mo
settings.text:
Entry-level. The starter kit for monthly grins.

4–5 items worth $80+:

  • Branded enamel pin and sticker pack
  • Premium microfiber towel
  • Garage consumable (tire shine, polish, or wipes)
  • 1 surprise drop

settings.title: APEX — $84/mo  ★ Most popular
settings.text:
Usable gear you'll actually reach for.

Everything in Pit Stop, plus 6–7 items worth $140+:

  • Branded apparel piece (tee, cap, or hoodie)
  • Mid-tier tool: torque adapter, OBD2 reader, tire pressure gauge
  • Premium detailing item
  • Limited-edition collectible

settings.title: PODIUM — $119/mo
settings.text:
The flex tier. One hero item every month.

Everything in Apex, plus a $60+ retail hero piece:

  • Driving gloves, helmet bag, or racing-branded jacket
  • GoPro mount kits, dashcam accessories
  • Track-day essentials
  • First dibs on limited drops and member-only merch

settings.title: Mike R., Charlotte NC
settings.text: "Got the Apex box for my 45th. My wife says I'm worse than a kid at Christmas every 15th of the month. Worth every dollar."

settings.title: Dave T., Austin TX
settings.text: "The Podium hero items alone are worth the sub. Got driving gloves last month I'd have never picked out myself — now I wear them every track day."

settings.title: Jim K., Phoenix AZ
settings.text: "Started with Pit Stop, upgraded to Apex after two months. The tool curation is on point — actually useful stuff, not landfill swag."

settings.heading: Wait — this is a pre-order?
settings.row_content:
Yes. We're launching with a pre-order window. First boxes ship the first week of August 2026. Your card is charged today and you lock in your tier — after the first box, the regular monthly cadence kicks in (boxes ship on the 15th of every month).

Founding pre-order subscribers get first dibs on limited drops and a small thank-you item in their first box.

settings.heading: When does my box ship after the first one?
settings.row_content: After the August 2026 launch box, the regular cadence kicks in: boxes ship on the 15th of every month. Order by the 10th to receive that month's drop — anything later ships the following month. Free US shipping on every tier.

settings.heading: Can I cancel anytime?
settings.row_content: Yes. No commitment, no cancellation fee. Manage your subscription from your account at any time. Skip a month, swap tiers, or pause when life gets in the way.

settings.heading: Is this stuff legit, or random AliExpress junk?
settings.row_content: Every box is curated by people who actually wrench, drive, and track. We work directly with brands like K&N, ARP, OEM tool makers, and small-batch automotive artisans. Each box's items add up to more than your subscription price — guaranteed.

settings.heading: What if I already have something?
settings.row_content: You can submit your interest profile after subscribing — favorite car platforms, garage setup, sizes — and we use it to avoid duplicates. Apex and Podium subscribers can also swap an item in any box.

settings.heading: Is this a good gift?
settings.row_content: It's the gift. Pick a 3, 6, or 12-month prepaid plan at checkout — no auto-renew, just a card explaining what's coming. Most popular gift: 6 months of Apex.

settings.heading: Not ready to sub? Get the inside line.

settings.text: Monthly emails: spoilers from upcoming boxes, member-only drops, track-day picks, and the occasional rant about manuals dying.
